EXPLANATION: The GitHub repository at https://github.com/ByteDance-Seed/seed-oss exists and its own embedded BibTeX citation uses exactly the title "Seed-OSS Open-Source Models" with `author={ByteDance Seed Team}` and `year={2025}`, matching the cited reference. The automated checker's "author mismatch" (ByteDance Seed Team vs. ByteDance-Seed) is simply a difference between the human-readable team name and the GitHub organization handle, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://github.com/ByteDance-Seed/seed-oss
